description: Collects data on user interactions with HTML5 videos (<video> elements) on your site. Tracks plays, pauses, volume, progress, and more. Optionally filter by CSS selectors, read titles from an HTML attribute, track volume as a custom dimension, and set progress thresholds.

when_to_use: Tracking native HTML5 <video> elements (not YouTube or Vimeo)
Measuring video engagement on self-hosted or CDN-hosted videos
Filtering which videos to track by CSS selector
Tracking volume level or progress as custom dimensions
common_use_cases: Videos with specific class or ID

template_options.description: Optional configuration. Can be omitted to track all HTML5 videos with defaults.

template_options.element_selectors.description: CSS selectors to limit tracking to matching videos only. E.g. ['video.product-demo', '#hero-video'].
template_options.element_selectors.recommendation: Use when you want to track only specific videos on the page

template_options.title_attribute.description: HTML attribute name to read video titles from (e.g. 'data-title', 'title').
template_options.title_attribute.recommendation: Set if videos have titles in a data attribute

template_options.track_thresholds.description: Percentage thresholds (0-100) to track progress. E.g. [25, 50, 75, 100]. All values must be unique. Create a custom dimension in Analytics first for interaction timestamps.
template_options.track_thresholds.recommendation: Create custom dimension in Analytics > Settings > Custom dimensions before using

template_options.volume_dimension_id.description: Custom dimension ID (1-400) to store volume level as percentage. Create the dimension in Analytics > Settings > Custom dimensions first.
template_options.volume_dimension_id.recommendation: Create custom dimension in Analytics first, then use its ID

disable_in_debug_mode.description: Disable when Tag Manager is in debug mode

basic_tracking.description: Track all HTML5 videos on the page
basic_tracking.prerequisite: Use All page views trigger or a trigger for pages with HTML5 videos.

with_selectors.description: Track only videos matching CSS selectors

full_options.description: Track with selectors, title attribute, progress, and volume dimension
full_options.prerequisite: Create custom dimensions in Analytics > Settings > Custom dimensions for volume and progress.

update_example.description: Update selectors or add progress tracking

common_mistakes: Using for YouTube or Vimeo videos (use video_youtube or custom code)
Forgetting to create custom dimensions before using volume_dimension_id or track_thresholds
Using duplicate values in track_thresholds (must be unique)

no_data_collected: Verify tag fires on pages with HTML5 <video> elements
Check element_selectors match your video elements if used
volume_or_progress_not_working: Create custom dimensions in Analytics > Settings > Custom dimensions first
Use correct dimension ID for volume_dimension_id
